title: Python List Creation
content: What is the correct syntax to create an empty list in Python?
explanation: In Python, lists are created using square brackets []. Empty lists are simply [].

title: Python Case Sensitivity
content: Python is case-sensitive, meaning 'Variable' and 'variable' are treated as different identifiers.
explanation: Yes, Python is case-sensitive. This means that 'Variable', 'variable', 'VARIABLE', and 'VaRiAbLe' would all be treated as different variable names.

title: Python Print Statement
content: To display 'Hello, World!' in Python, you would use: _____("Hello, World!")
explanation: The print() function is used to output text to the console in Python.

title: Software Development Lifecycle
content: Arrange the following phases of software development in the correct chronological order:
explanation: The typical SDLC follows: Requirements Analysis → System Design → Implementation/Coding → Testing → Deployment → Maintenance

items.description: Gathering and documenting what the software should do
Creating the architecture and detailed design

title: Programming Languages and Paradigms
content: Match each programming language with its primary programming paradigm:
explanation: Different languages emphasize different programming paradigms, though many support multiple paradigms.

title: Database Normalization
content: What is the main purpose of database normalization?
explanation: Database normalization reduces data redundancy and improves data integrity by organizing data into separate related tables.

options.text: To reduce data redundancy and improve data integrity

title: HTTP Status Code
content: HTTP status code 404 indicates that the requested resource was found but access is forbidden.
explanation: False. HTTP 404 means 'Not Found' - the requested resource could not be found. HTTP 403 'Forbidden' indicates the resource exists but access is denied.
